title: Slab-built wall-mounted coat hook
notes: Wall hook with a flat oval or rectangular back plate and a projecting coil or slab hook arm. Back plate has two or three countersunk holes for screw fixing. Hook arm is a thick coil or slab strip, bent to approximately 45 degrees and joined to the back plate with slip and scoring. Air-dry clay is not load-bearing; for light items (keys, light scarves) only. PVA sealed.
